final:
module RefModule(
  input clk, rst,
  input signed [7:0] vector1,
  input signed [7:0] vector2,
  output reg signed [15:0] product
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    if (rst) begin
      product <= 0;
    end
    else begin
      product <= vector1 * vector2;
    end
  end

endmodule
